changes_made: Changed k8s_ingress_controller_waf_enabled to k8s_ingress_waf_enabled for consistency with naming conventions
review_notes: The functions generally map well to the concept of web filtering in Kubernetes. Network policies can indeed restrict web traffic, and ingress controllers can utilize WAFs. Service meshes are also relevant for advanced traffic management. However, the naming for the ingress function was slightly adjusted for consistency.
naming_improvements: Ensure 'ingress' is used consistently without 'controller' unless specifically referring to the controller configuration
title: Web Filtering
step1_reasoning: The ISO27001 control A.8.23 focuses on web filtering, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that network policies restrict web traffic appropriately and by enabling web application firewalls (WAF) on ingress controllers. Additionally, service meshes can provide web filtering capabilities through advanced traffic management and security features.
